title: Gamemode 4 Resources
description: Use our resource pack for the definitive Gamemode 4 experience!
body: # Gamemode 4 Resources An optional resource pack to use with [Gamemode 4 data packs](https://gm4.co/). This resource pack does not touch vanilla textures, but adds textures and models to most Gamemode 4 blocks, items and mobs. ![A ship with a bunch of Gamemode 4 items, blocks, and entities that have custom textures](https://gm4.co/images/slideshow/resourcepack_1.png)
